grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: No specific section numbers mentioned - only general references to CA Protocol and Best Practice Guide

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Clearly states 'operational development (building works) became immune from enforcement after 4 years' under old rule

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Extensively discusses indemnity insurance as standard solution and mentions retrospective planning application for high-risk cases

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'Planning Permission and Building Regulations are separate' and discusses Building Regulations Completion Certificate

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Mentions 4-year old rule, 10-year new rule from 2023 Act, and dates the change to April 25, 2024
